content.text:
[cron:13352d2a-0d9f-4019-b0aa-31df93e9615e 每日早报-国际新闻] 你是南天的AI助手。现在是北京时间早上7点，请生成国际新闻精选推送。必须使用 web_search 搜索获取最新国际新闻（BBC和纽约时报），然后严格按以下格式输出：

🌍 国际新闻精选 🌍
📅 [当天日期]
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
📡 BBC精选：
1️⃣ [标题] [简短描述]
2️⃣ [标题] [简短描述]
...共5条
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
📡 纽约时报精选：
6️⃣ [标题] [简短描述]
...共5条
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
⚡ AI助手 · 国际视野

直接输出，不要额外解释。必须通过搜索获取真实数据，不要编造。
Current time: Friday, May 8th, 2026 - 11:09 PM (UTC) / 2026-05-08 23:09 UTC

Use the message tool if you need to notify the user directly for the current chat. If you do not send directly, your final plain-text reply will be delivered automatically.

content.thinking:
用户要求我作为南天的AI助手，生成国际新闻精选推送。要求：
1. 使用 web_search 搜索获取最新国际新闻（BBC和纽约时报）
2. 按照指定格式输出
3. 必须使用真实数据，不能编造

当前时间是 2026-05-08 23:09 UTC，北京时间应该是 2026-05-09 07:09（UTC+8）。

我需要：
1. 搜索 BBC 国际新闻
2. 搜索纽约时报国际新闻
3. 按照格式输出

让我开始搜索。

/news/articles/c99lpn9ze8ro
[Iran accuses US of 'reckless military adventure'Abbas Araghchi says the US attacks each time there is a diplomatic solution on the table.7 hrs agoWorld](/news/articles/c99lpn9ze8ro)

[Trump says Russia and Ukraine to observe three-day ceasefireIt comes as the two countries accused each other of violating separate ceasefires to cover the celebrations of the Soviet Union's victory over Nazi Germany.4 hrs agoEurope](/news/articles/c202zn5gg0lo)
[International cyber attack disrupts swathe of universities and schools A hacking group breached the academic software Canvas, used by thousands of schools and universities across the globe.7 hrs agoUS & Canada](/news/articles/ce3pq0136eqo)
[Three dead after volcano erupts on Indonesian islandOfficials had previously issued warnings on climbing the active volcano due to safety concerns. 11 hrs agoAsia](/news/articles/cp3p418x513o)

[Worldwide race to trace passengers from hantavirus-hit cruise shipAbout 12 countries have so far been linked to the hantavirus outbreak on the MV Hondius, as the UN health agency confirms at least five cases.2 hrs agoHealth](/news/articles/clyp1505p84o)
[Greece examines mystery naval drone found in Ionian SeaGreek media say the drone, which reportedly had explosives, could be either Ukrainian or linked to the Russia-Ukraine war.5 hrs agoEurope](/news/articles/cx217expnvvo)
[Hovering objects and flashing lights: what we learned from UFO documents released by the PentagonThe US has published transcripts, video clips and audio recordings about unidentified flying objects, also called unidentified anomalous phenomena.1 hr agoUS & Canada](/news/articles/c1m2epkey44o)

[White House calls Mark Hamill 'sick' after actor's Trump grave postThe Star Wars actor apologised and deleted the post, which contained an AI image of the president in a shallow grave.](/news/articles/c4g723pkgllo)
[Oil prices rise after US and Iran exchange fire in Hormuz straitUS President Donald Trump says the ceasefire between Washington and Tehran is still in place.](/news/articles/c86dp85g59xo)
[South Africa president faces call to resign after court rulingThe Constitutional Court says MPs were was wrong to block impeachment proceedings against Cyril Ramaphosa.](/news/articles/cy4287vpvl7o)
[Third British national has suspected hantavirus infection, UK government saysFive cases of hantavirus have been confirmed in total, including one of the three passengers on the MV Hondius who died.](/news/articles/c5yr41vq2ero)
[US jet fuel could be used in Europe to ease possible shortagesAn international air body suggests wider acceptance of US-grade jet fuel could help to head off any supply problems.](/news/articles/cp8pk2m4nlxo)

## Features

[The companies making billions from the Iran warThrough surging profits or soaring share prices, the war has been a boon for some firms.](/news/articles/ce8pyyz5e0ro)
[Trump and Lula's private Oval Office meeting signals lingering strain - and effort to avoid tensionThe US and Brazilian presidents did not appear together publicly, but traded compliments after their talks.](/news/articles/c8r8gxjxz10o)
[Rosenberg: Russia's Victory Day parade with no tanks a sign Ukraine war not going to planFor the first time in nearly two decades, there will be no military hardware, just soldiers during Saturday's parade in Moscow.](/news/articles/cwy2gj2jlr8o)
[Thousands of North Koreans fought for Russia. A memorial hints at the death tollAn estimated 11,000 North Korean soldiers were sent to fight in Russia's war against Ukraine.](/news/articles/clypr5985ejo)

## Highlights

- ### [Iran War Live Updates: U.S. Fires on Tankers as Tehran Accuses Washington of ‘Reckless’ Attacks](https://www.nytimes.com/live/2026/05/08/world/iran-strikes-trump-ceasefire-hormuz)
Iran’s foreign minister accused Washington of undermining diplomacy. Secretary of State Marco Rubio said the U.S. expected to hear from Tehran on Friday.Creditvia Reuters
- ### [Live Updates: Starmer’s Party Suffers Stark Losses in U.K. Local Elections](https://www.nytimes.com/live/2026/05/08/world/uk-local-elections-results)
Prime Minister Keir Starmer took responsibility as Labour lost more than a thousand municipal seats but insisted he would not resign.CreditLeon Neal/Getty Images
- ### [U.A.E. Expels Pakistani Workers, as Pakistan’s Peacemaking Creates a Rift](/2026/05/08/world/asia/uae-pakistan-workers-deportations.html)
As Pakistan mediates between the U.S. and Iran, its ties to the Emirates have deteriorated. Pakistani workers say they are now being sent home en masse. By Elian PeltierZia ur-Rehman and CreditAsim Hafeez for The New York Times
- ### [The French Couple That Tried to Burgle 29 Churches in 3 Months](/2026/05/08/france-churches-burglaries-couple.html)
A spree of thefts last summer heightened alarm in France over protection of cultural and rural heritage. By Catherine Porter and Ana CastelainCreditAndrea Mantovani for The New York Times
